content: MQTT service discovery: declare services: [mqtt:need] (fail if unavailable) or mqtt:want (optional). Supervisor injects credentials via bashio: bashio::services mqtt host, username, password, port. Eliminates ARGUS_MQTT_* env vars. mqtt:need means add-on fails to start if Mosquitto not installed; mqtt:want degrades gracefully. For Argus, mqtt:need is correct since MQTT is the only HA egress channel.
